name: Floor Grinders
description: Heavy-duty concrete floor grinders for surface preparation, coating removal, and polishing in construction projects.

machines.name: Trelawny TCG 500 Floor Grinder
machines.shortDescription: Heavy-duty walk-behind concrete floor grinder for surface preparation, coating removal, and polishing. Electric-powered with dust extraction port.
machines.description: Heavy-duty walk-behind concrete floor grinder for surface preparation, coating removal, and polishing. Electric-powered with dust extraction port. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Ideal for concrete, epoxy, and paint removal

machines.name: Husqvarna PG 280 Single Phase Concrete Grinder
machines.shortDescription: Single-phase 230V concrete floor grinder with 280 mm grinding width. Husqvarna PG 280 for coating removal, surface preparation, and polishing on small-to-medium floor areas.
machines.description: Single-phase 230V concrete floor grinder with 280 mm grinding width. Husqvarna PG 280 for coating removal, surface preparation, and polishing on small-to-medium floor areas. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Application: Epoxy removal, concrete polishing, screed grinding, glue removal
specifications.Water Feed: Optional wet grinding kit with tank

features: 230V single-phase motor plugs into any standard site outlet with a 16A breaker
280 mm grinding width covers 25 m²/hr on epoxy removal and fits through standard doorways
Variable speed from 300 to 1,200 RPM for grinding, honing, and final polishing stages
Three quick-change diamond segment holders for tool changes without removing the machine
Integrated dust extraction port connects to any 50 mm vacuum hose for clean operation
92 kg chassis with folding handle for transport in a standard service van or pickup

machines.name: Husqvarna PG 450 Planetary Floor Grinder
machines.shortDescription: Planetary concrete floor grinder with 450 mm grinding width and 3-phase motor. Husqvarna PG 450 for large-scale coating removal, surface levelling, and high-gloss polished concrete.
machines.description: Planetary concrete floor grinder with 450 mm grinding width and 3-phase motor. Husqvarna PG 450 for large-scale coating removal, surface levelling, and high-gloss polished concrete. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Dust Extraction: 76 mm port with built-in shroud seal
specifications.Water Feed: Integrated wet grinding with 30 L tank

features: Planetary 3-head system with counter-rotating discs delivers scratch-free polished finish
450 mm grinding path covers 45 m²/hr on coating removal — floors done in hours
Nine diamond segment positions for aggressive stock removal or fine grit polishing in one machine
5.5 kW 3-phase motor maintains constant speed under load for consistent surface profile
Integrated 30 L water tank with flow control for dust-free wet grinding without a separate bowser
155 kg with heavy-duty lift chassis for crane hoisting between floors on multi-storey projects
